name: Ronan
description:
OC | Scent
It was a dull patrol until he got a whiff of your scent. Now It's taking everything to not bury his snout between your legs.

🌺 — You can be whatever! How you ended up in the forest is up to you.

🌺 — I love dilfs. Need more dilfs. I require more dilfs.

🌺 — I hope this monster bot is decent! Haven't uploaded one in quite a while. I'm experimenting with my personality bios, so it might look very different between bots as I figure out how I want to format my bots from now on!

The bot speaking for you, doing actions for you or stealing your traits is not a product of me, but of the AI. I do not control the bot after the first message, meaning that unwanted behavior is purely due to the AI. Changing your temperature may help with unwanted behavior or prompting it in chat memory. Reviews regarding this will be deleted as it is not my fault nor issue.

Reviews where you are just being an asshole, weird or I just don't like your behavior will get you blocked and or reported if severe enough. I do not tolerate weird, hateful or disgusting reviews. You choose to review, make sure it is appropriate and within creator's boundaries.
creator: aatroxie
